sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal. Eth. ዐዊር፡ to be blind. Arab. عَوِرَ and عَارَ to be blind of an eye.

Piel עִוֵּר to blind, to make blind. (Syr. ܥܰܘܪܰ In its origin perhaps עִוִּרִ is the same as עִפֵּר to cast dust, sand, chaff into the eye; compare Chald. עוּר.) 2Ki 25:7 Jer 39:7. Metaph. to blind a judge (with gifts), Exo 23:8 Deu 16:19. [In Thes. this Pie1 form is deduced from עוּר III.]

Derived nouns (עוּר), עִוִּרִ, עִוָּרֹון, עַוֶּרֶת.
